findings.title: Task existence oracle across org boundaries
findings.description: The task is fetched with an unscoped getTask(taskId) call, then a 'not_found' error is returned before the org membership check. An attacker in org A can distinguish between 'task ID does not exist' vs 'task exists but belongs to another org', enabling cross-organization task ID enumeration. In a security-focused PR, the org guard should be evaluated before leaking existence information, or both cases should return an identical error.
